_about: Denominator-accuracy audit of the AGENT lane (2026-07-03). Each id below carries a MUST/MUST NOT whose SOLE obligated party is the business/server, so it does NOT belong in the AGENT (platform/client) denominator — it entered via the subject heuristic or the merchant 'client-bound' class ('not-merchant' != 'agent'). Removing them makes 100% agent coverage achievable-by-construction. Every classification was spec-grounded (independent adjudication of all 101 rows + author spot-verification against the pinned spec). Referenced by agent_matrix.NOT_AGENT_BOUND.

not_agent_bound.A2A-001: checkout-a2a.md#L142 — 'The Checkout entity must be returned by the business agent to the platform' (business response construction)
not_agent_bound.MCP-001: catalog/mcp.md#L690 — 'a conforming MCP transport implementation MUST ... both tools MUST be available' (the server/endpoint exposes the tools)
not_agent_bound.NEG-001: overview.md#L1912 — 'Business MUST return a version_unsupported error'
not_agent_bound.NEG-002: overview.md#L1916 — 'business MUST return a capabilities_incompatible error'
not_agent_bound.NEG-003: overview.md#L697 — profile_unreachable -> 424, a server-emitted error response
not_agent_bound.NEG-004: overview.md#L698 — profile_malformed -> 422, a server-emitted error response
not_agent_bound.OVR-011: overview.md#L1974 — 'Businesses MUST include only capabilities compatible ... in their response'
not_agent_bound.OVR-012: overview.md#L632-640 — under '#### Business Requirements': 'Extensions ... MUST be excluded' from the business response
not_agent_bound.PAY-038: ap2-mandates.md#L122 — 'If a public key cannot be resolved ... the business MUST return an error'
not_agent_bound.ORD-018: expectation.json#L7 / order.md#L39 — required fields of the business-authored 'expectation' (order is GET-only for the platform)
not_agent_bound.ORD-019: fulfillment_event.json#L7 / order.md#L40 — required fields of 'fulfillment_event' = the business's append-only log of actual shipments

kept_after_review.OVR-001: DUAL — overview.md#L59 'All capability and service names MUST use the format' binds both platform and business profiles
kept_after_review.PAY-037: DUAL/agent — ap2-mandates.md#L118 the signing key is provided in the PLATFORM profile's signing_keys; 'for the business to verify' names the consumer, not the obligated party
kept_after_review.DSC-013: AGENT — discount.md#L191 'Cannot be removed by the platform' is a prohibition on the platform
